changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE notifications n SET order_kind = o.kind, target_type = 'ORDER', target_id = n.order_id, target_kind = o.kind, route = CASE o.kind WHEN 'ALBUM' THEN '/album' WHEN 'VIGNETTE' THEN '/vignette' WHEN 'PICTURE' THEN '/picture' ELSE NULL END FROM orders o WHERE n.order_id = o.id AND n.target_id IS NULL;
